labelConventions.note: service_account_id, signer_kid, and tenant_id as full ULIDs are cardinality bombs — tens of thousands of SAs across every tenant. Use aggregated dimensions (application_id, trigger, outcome) instead. IP + user_agent belong in audit logs, never on metric labels.

metrics.name: academorix.service_account.created
metrics.description: Fired on ServiceAccountCreated. tenant_scoped = true|false (whether tenant_id is populated).

metrics.name: academorix.service_account.enabled
metrics.description: Fired on ServiceAccountEnabled.

metrics.name: academorix.service_account.disabled
metrics.description: Fired on ServiceAccountDisabled. trigger = manual|expired|dormant|suspicious_activity|incident.

metrics.name: academorix.service_account.deleted
metrics.description: Fired on ServiceAccountDeleted. erasure_phase = soft_delete|hard_delete.

metrics.name: academorix.service_account.rotated
metrics.description: Fired on ServiceAccountSecretRotated. trigger = manual|scheduled|incident|expired_grace.

metrics.name: academorix.service_account.rotation.warned
metrics.description: NotifyRotationDueJob dispatched a rotation-due notification for an SA.

metrics.name: academorix.service_account.expired
metrics.description: PurgeExpiredServiceAccountsJob detected an SA past grace + soft-disabled it.

metrics.name: academorix.service_account.retention.purged
metrics.description: PurgeExpiredServiceAccountsJob hard-deleted a soft-deleted SA past retention hold.

metrics.name: academorix.service_account.jwt.issued
metrics.description: Token-exchange OR test-issue path. trigger = exchange|test. outcome = success|rate_limited|invalid_credentials|disabled|expired|kid_invalid.

metrics.name: academorix.service_account.jwt.issue_duration_ms
metrics.description: Wall-clock of the token-exchange endpoint. Successful bcrypt::check is the main contributor (target P95 < 500ms). Failure timing MUST fall in the same bucket as success to preserve constant-time comparison at the endpoint level.

metrics.name: academorix.service_account.jwt.verify
metrics.description: service_account.verify_jwt middleware invocations. outcome = success|signature_invalid|kid_invalid|kid_disabled|jti_deny_listed|iss_mismatch|aud_mismatch|exp_elapsed|sa_disabled|sa_expired|app_mismatch|tid_mismatch.

metrics.name: academorix.service_account.jwt.verify_duration_ms
metrics.description: Wall-clock of service_account.verify_jwt middleware. Target P95 < 25ms (JWT verify is cheap; DB round-trip to load the SA row is the tail).

metrics.name: academorix.service_account.dormant.detected
metrics.description: DetectDormantServiceAccountJob flagged an SA. Per-application counter.

metrics.name: academorix.service_account.usage_detected_after_dormancy
metrics.description: First-request-after-dormancy detection. Security-relevant signal.

metrics.name: academorix.service_account.suspicious_activity
metrics.description: signal_type = rate_spike_novel_ip|rate_spike_novel_ua|high_failure_rate|cross_kid_signature_reuse.

metrics.name: academorix.service_account.exchange_rate_limited
metrics.description: Token-exchange endpoint rate-limit rejections. throttle_bucket = sa_id|ip_prefix_24.

metrics.name: academorix.service_account.kid_rotation.propagated
metrics.description: auth::JwtSigningKeyRotated propagated through the module. mode = in_place|renamed.

metrics.name: academorix.service_account.kid_burned.alerted
metrics.description: auth::JwtSigningKeyDisabled affected N SAs. Emitted once per (kid, affected_sa) pair.

metrics.name: academorix.service_account.last_used.flush
metrics.description: UpdateLastUsedTimestampJob flush batch size. Tail growth signals accumulating write pressure.

metrics.name: academorix.service_account.request.audit
metrics.description: service_account.audit middleware invocations. outcome = success|error|rate_limited|verification_failed.

metrics.name: academorix.service_account.active_count
metrics.description: Count of rows where is_enabled = true AND deleted_at IS NULL AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > now()). Emitted every 60s.

metrics.name: academorix.service_account.rotation_due_count
metrics.description: Count of active SAs whose expires_at falls inside the warning window. Emitted hourly.

metrics.name: academorix.service_account.dormant_count
metrics.description: Count of active SAs whose last_used_at is older than the dormant threshold. Emitted weekly.

metrics.name: academorix.service_account.expired_count
metrics.description: Count of SAs still enabled but past expires_at (pre-purge). Emitted every 5 minutes.
